subcontrols.description: Annual cryptographic inventory review and migration strategy.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine crypto inventory. Verify annual review and documented response strategy.

subcontrols.name: Hardware and software technologies in use are reviewed at least once every 12 months to confirm whether they continue to receive security fixes from the vendor
subcontrols.description: Annual technology end-of-life review.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine technology inventory reviews. Verify annual assessment of vendor support status.

subcontrols.name: PCI DSS scope is documented and confirmed by the entity at least once every 12 months and upon significant change to the in-scope environment
subcontrols.description: Annual PCI DSS scope validation.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine scoping documentation. Verify annual scope confirmation.

subcontrols.name: PCI DSS scope is documented and confirmed by the entity at least once every six months and upon significant change for service providers
subcontrols.description: Semi-annual scope confirmation for service providers.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine scoping documentation. Verify six-month scope confirmation cadence.

subcontrols.name: Significant changes to organizational structure result in a documented review of the impact to PCI DSS scope and applicability of controls
subcontrols.description: Scope review after organizational changes.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine change records. Verify PCI scope reviewed after significant org changes.

subcontrols.name: A formal security awareness program is implemented to make all personnel aware of the entity's information security policy and procedures, and their role in protecting the cardholder data
subcontrols.description: Security awareness training program for all personnel.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine training program materials and records. Verify all personnel trained.

subcontrols.name: The security awareness program is reviewed at least once every 12 months and updated as needed to address any new threats and vulnerabilities
subcontrols.description: Annual security awareness program review covering current threats.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine program review records. Verify annual updates addressing new threats.

subcontrols.name: Personnel receive security awareness training upon hire and at least once every 12 months
subcontrols.description: Annual security awareness training for all personnel.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine training records. Verify onboarding and annual refresher training.

subcontrols.name: Security awareness training includes awareness of threats such as phishing and social engineering, and how to report security incidents
subcontrols.description: Training covers social engineering and incident reporting.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine training content. Verify coverage of required topics.

subcontrols.name: Security awareness training includes awareness of the acceptable use of end-user technologies
subcontrols.description: Training specifically addresses acceptable technology use.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine training materials. Verify acceptable use content included.

subcontrols.name: Personnel are screened prior to hire to minimize the risk of attacks from internal sources
subcontrols.description: Pre-employment background screening.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine screening policies and records. Verify background checks performed.

subcontrols.name: Risk to information assets associated with third-party service provider relationships is managed
subcontrols.description: Third-party service provider risk management.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine TPSP inventory and risk assessments. Verify ongoing management.

subcontrols.name: Written agreements or contracts are maintained with all TPSPs with which account data is shared or that could affect the security of the CDE
subcontrols.description: Written contracts with all TPSPs handling account data.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine TPSP contracts. Verify agreements include security responsibilities.

subcontrols.name: An established process is in place for engaging TPSPs including proper due diligence prior to engagement
subcontrols.description: TPSP engagement process with due diligence.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine TPSP onboarding process. Verify due diligence performed before engagement.

subcontrols.name: A program is implemented to monitor TPSPs' PCI DSS compliance status at least once every 12 months
subcontrols.description: Annual TPSP compliance monitoring.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine TPSP monitoring records. Verify annual compliance status review.

subcontrols.name: Information is maintained about which PCI DSS requirements are managed by each TPSP, which are managed by the entity, and any that are shared
subcontrols.description: TPSP responsibility matrix documenting shared controls.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine TPSP responsibility matrices. Verify clear delineation of requirements.

subcontrols.name: An incident response plan exists and is ready to be activated in the event of a suspected or confirmed security incident
subcontrols.description: Documented incident response plan.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine incident response plan. Verify it is current and ready for activation.

subcontrols.name: The security incident response plan is reviewed and updated as needed at least once every 12 months and after any significant incident
subcontrols.description: Annual IR plan review and post-incident updates.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine IR plan review records. Verify annual review and post-incident updates.

subcontrols.name: Specific personnel are designated to be available on a 24/7 basis to respond to suspected or confirmed security incidents
subcontrols.description: 24/7 incident response team availability.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine on-call schedules. Verify 24/7 coverage for incident response.

subcontrols.name: Personnel responsible for responding to suspected and confirmed security incidents are appropriately and periodically trained on their incident response responsibilities
subcontrols.description: Incident response team training.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine IR team training records. Verify periodic training on IR responsibilities.

subcontrols.name: The security incident response plan includes monitoring and responding to alerts from security monitoring systems
subcontrols.description: IR plan covers security alert monitoring and response.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine IR plan. Verify alert monitoring and response procedures included.

subcontrols.name: The incident response plan is tested at least once every 12 months
subcontrols.description: Annual incident response plan testing.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine test records. Verify annual IR plan testing (tabletop or simulation).

subcontrols.name: A process is in place for the timely detection and reporting of failures of critical security control systems
subcontrols.description: Detection and reporting of security control failures.
subcontrols.guidance: Examine detection processes. Verify timely failure detection and reporting.
